body_preview: - Trajectory graph pressure (Day 110): `deepseek_cache_ratio_unverified_count=1` — a DeepSeek cache hit ratio was reported in prose without token-backed cache metrics to independently verify it. - `scripts/log_feedback.py` line 2548 self-tests this: `check("cache prose ratio marked unverified", cache_prose["deepseek_cache_ratio_unverified_count"] == 1, cache
expected_evidence: A new `is_token_backed()` method on `DeepSeekUsage` with unit tests covering all three cases (both Some, one Some, both None) Future log_feedback.py or dashboard code can call this method (via state events that record DeepSeekUsage) to flag unverified ratios The `deepseek_cache_ratio_unverified_count` metric will become more reliable when downstream code con
title: Add `is_token_backed()` method to DeepSeekUsage for cache ratio verification
